children.heading: .—General Applicability
children.label: a .—General Applicability
children.text: Any provision of this part that is a chapter 137 legacy provision applies to the procurement by any of the agencies named in , for its use or otherwise, of all property (other than land) and all services for which payment is to be made from appropriated funds.section 3063 of this title

children.heading: .—Applicability to Contracts for Installation or Alteration
children.label: b .—Applicability to Contracts for Installation or Alteration
children.text: The provisions of this part that are chapter 137 legacy provisions that apply to the procurement of property apply also to contracts for its installation or alteration.
